title: terminalia bentzoe subsp. bentzoe
intro: Terminalia bentzoe subsp. bentzoe, also known as styrax or benzoin tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Combretaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Terminalia bentzoe subsp. bentzoe include reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds, and providing relief from stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant include resin, which can be used to create ointments, salves, and teas for topical and internal use.
